headline: Pfizer Hemophilia Approval Expands HYMPAVZI Reach And Supports Valuation Case
summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) received European Commission approval to expand HYMPAVZI to adolescents with hemophilia A or B and inhibitors. The decision opens access to a new patient group within the EU hemophilia market for this rare disease therapy. The expanded label highlights bleed protection and a simplified administration regimen for a hard to treat population. For investors watching NYSE:PFE, this update is part of Pfizer's broader push in rare diseases, an area where specialized treatments...
